evidence.console_errors_excerpt: 8 errors / 5 issues — multiple CSP 'script-src-elem' violations (e.g. https://scripts.clarity.ms/0.8.64/clarity.js blocked by Content Security Policy). No app-level errors observable because chat UI not reachable.

recommendation: Cohere Coral chat (https://coral.cohere.com/) now hard-redirects unauthenticated visitors to https://dashboard.cohere.com/welcome/login. Mass rotation for cohere needs a logged-in Chrome profile (saved session/cookies) before APF v2.2.3 baseline can be exercised. Suggest: provision a test account, persist its cookie jar in the test PC Chrome profile, then re-queue 815. Until then this baseline cannot be measured and verdict cannot distinguish OK / regressions.
notes: Engine v2.2.3 baseline run for #815. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R) executed; landing page is the Cohere login form (Continue with Google / Continue with Github / EMAIL+PASSWORD). No prompt input field exists, so the test prompt was not submitted. DevTools opened — Console shows CSP script-src-elem blocks (clarity.ms etc.) which are unrelated to APF; no chat XHR was issued. Cookie consent banner present. Verdict: error_AUTH_REQUIRED (not REGRESSION). Total wall time well under 3.5 min.
